EmailTemplate.name: 1st FNOL Chaser to Insured
EmailTemplate.subject: Information still required to support claims process
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
(Use for those who notified us) I hope you don’t mind me contacting you regarding your potential (insert claim type) and our email sent on (insert date).
Please could you let me know if you wish to make a claim and do let me know if you require any assistance in collecting the information requested in order that we may present a claim.
(Use for those where we received notification) We have received notification from another party looking to claim against you. Please could you provide the details requested as your policy with us may be able to respond.
Please note insurers are not yet aware of your claim until you forward the details below in order for me to present.
(For PI do not reference to still wishing to make a claim as all PI claims need referring to insurers.)
I look forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Claims Team
E: claims@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
